entries.title: ServiceError Two-Layer Conversion for Multi-Transport Error Handling
Adding a new Claude Code hook event type: registration + dispatcher + storage + detection
UDS dispatch arms: adding a session registry call triggers sanitize_session_id audit
UDS Observation Log: operator-togglable debug visibility via unimatrix_server::obs target
Bootstrapping problem: early-session MCP tool calls fail when the session is fixing the tool being used
